project1.title: K-Mart E-Commerce
project1.description: A complete e-commerce platform including store, blog, admin dashboard, and custom API. Built with modern React tooling and full authentication, data management and UI systems. Hosted with Contabo on a VPS Coolify was installed to leverage the CI/CD and server management. N8N instance for daily requesting Contabo to make a backup of the VPS, UMAMI instance for metrics, 2 branches dev and prod, Grafana instance for VPS vitals, daily backups and a cron job for uploading to Mega and deleting old backups on Mega. Pictures are automatically converted into webp and thumbs are generated, SEO is dynamic
project1.story: K-Mart was a client project where I developed a complete ecosystem. I implemented an admin dashboard and a custom API, optimizing performance and scalability. This project taught me how to structure complex systems efficiently.

project5.title: CAG Community Register
project5.description: A simple website for registering those who belong to the International Church of Almighty God number 1 and Czech Church of Almighty God. Built on top of NextJS, hosted on Vercel and the information is registered on a Google SpreadSheet. Goal was making the modification, filtering and metrics easier for the admin
project5.story: This community register began when i noticed the deacon was manipulating all of the data on paper, i offered her to digitalize everything in order to save some time.

project6.title: upydate
project6.description: A Python-based scraper designed to cleanly deliver downloads, automating a process that was previously impossible manually at the workshop.
project6.story: Upydate was created to automate repetitive manual download tasks at my workshop. The project improved my Python scraping skills and taught me how to handle errors, logging, and scheduling reliably.

project7.title: JSONtoVCF Converter
project7.description: A tool built for a client to convert Telegram JSON exports into import-ready VCF contact files. Designed for reliability and ease of use.
project7.story: This project was a client request to convert exported Telegram contacts into VCF format. I focused on reliability and creating a tool that was intuitive and could handle edge cases with real-world data.
